name: Peripheral Arterial Disease
description: This test case evaluates the ability to identify patients with peripheral arterial disease (PAD). PAD affects approximately 10-12 million adults in the US with high morbidity and mortality.
prompt: Find all patients diagnosed with peripheral arterial disease, including those with intermittent claudication, ankle-brachial index abnormalities, or who have undergone peripheral vascular procedures.

required_codes.display: Atherosclerosis of native arteries of the extremities
